holdings.infoBox: GQQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.99%, Apple at 7.17%, Microsoft at 4.48%, Micron Technology at 4.28%, and Alphabet at 3.74%.

overview.description: The Astoria US Quality Growth Kings ETF (GQQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of 75 to 100 US companies exhibiting quality and growth characteristics. The fund uses a quantitative approach to stock selection GQQQ was launched on Oct 1, 2024 and is issued by Astoria.
